inventory_icon_direction: Tilted from lower-left to upper-right, like the supplied diagonal icon.
male_female_fit_notes: Same grip placement for male and female player models. No gender-specific changes needed.
model_notes: Updated OBJ rebuilt to match the newer concept art more closely: long tapered diamond-section blade, gold winged crossguard, central orange gem, leather grip, and faceted pommel. Mesh remains intentionally game-friendly and relatively low poly.
origin_recommendation: Place the weapon origin at the center of the grip near y=-0.75 for hand attachment in your toolchain.
